description: Add an MCP tool ao.requirements.validate that checks whether a task's implementation satisfies its linked requirement's acceptance criteria. Takes a task_id, reads linked requirements, evaluates each acceptance criterion against current codebase state (git diff, file existence, test results). Returns a structured report: { criteria: [{ text, met: bool, evidence }], overall_pass: bool }. Enables agents to self-verify their work before signaling phase completion.
title: Add ao.requirements.validate MCP tool for acceptance criteria verification
